OSR Digital is one of the largest digital and physical (CD, VCD, DVD) movie distribution companies in Nepal. The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.title: Toxic Yash 2 in 1 Teaser CinemaCon | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Toxic Yash 2 in 1 Teaser CinemaCon Reaction By Deeksha Sharma. Rocking Star Yash Toxic Movie is set for CinemaCon Debut with New Teaser Trailer while Namit Malhotra Ramayana with Ranbir Kapoor is scheduled for Ravan Yash Glimpse Reveal very soon after Not So Impressive Rama Glimpse Teaser. Why Yash in CinemaCon is a Bigger news for Indian Cinema & How Toxic Movie can change the Hollywood Game forever but Ramayana is 100% Guaranteed to break every box office records, Find all the Answers inside.

#Toxic #ToxicYash #ToxicTeaser

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.      
 
Directed by: 
Jacob Chase  

Screenplay by: 
Jacob Chase

Story by: 
David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase

Based on characters created by: 
Leigh Whannell 
                                                                       
Produced by: 
Jason Blum
Oren Peli
James Wan
Leigh Whannell
 
Executive Producers: 
Steven Schneider
Ryan Turek
Brian Kavanaugh-Jones
David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick

Cast: 
Amelia Eve
Brandon Perea
and Lin Shaye

Credits not final

This film is not yet rated by The Motion Picture Association. For future rating information, please visit www.filmratings.com.

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

✖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

✖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.description:

--------------------------------------------------------------
Welcome to the official broadcast of the PMNC Nepal LAN Finals! Get ready for two days of intense action as
the top 16 teams from Nepal battle it out for glory and a spot in the PMNC South Asia stage.

🏆 Event: PMNC Nepal LAN Finals
📅 Dates: 10th & 11th April
⏰ Time: 12 PM NST onwards

🎮 Playing Teams:
Abrupt Slayers
3 Real Bros
4 Death Machines
Trained to Kill
The Four Elements
Hidden Leaf Esports
Drevhe Esports
NEPX Esports
Yonko Juttis
Ready For War
DRS Gaming
Royal Dragons Esports
The Gaming Broskis
Rivals X
Only Esports
Original Gangsters

🗺️ Match Schedule & Maps:
📍 10th April: Rondo, Erangel, Erangel, Miramar, Miramar
📍 11th April: Rondo, Erangel, Erangel, Miramar, Miramar

⚡ Qualification:
Top 12 teams will qualify for PMNC South Asia 

#PMNC #PMNCNEPAL #ROADTOPMGO

snippet.title: Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 Official Trailer | Avinash Tiwary, Medha Shankr | Prasshant Jha | 24 April 2026
snippet.description:
The madness is back… and this time, it’s bigger, louder, and full-on #BawaalFamilyEntertainer

Ginny and Sunny return to a new phase of love, marriage, and family chaos. But when expectations clash, secrets unfold, and relatives get a little too involved… things spiral into a rollercoaster of emotions, laughter, and full desi drama.
Get ready for a sequel where love gets messier, families get louder, and every moment is pure entertainment.

Z Studios and Soundrya Production Present
A Soundrya Production Film
Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 In Cinemas 24th APRIL 2026

Credits 
Written and Directed by Prasshant Jha
Produced by Vinod Bachchan & Umesh Kumar Bansal

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji First Look  Hindi Teaser | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
For the land that forged warriors. 
For the faith that never wavered. 
For the dream of Swarajya that lived in every heart… 
With deep reverence to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj,  we proudly unveil the first look teaser of Raja Shivaji — India’s Greatest Warrior King. 👑 
 Our King. Our Pride. Our Legacy. 🚩 
 Directed by Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh. 
#RajaShivaji In cinemas on 1st May 2026 in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed by: Riteish Deshmukh
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande & Genelia Deshmukh

snippet.title: Manai Man Ma | मनै मनमा | New Nepali DJ Dancing Song | Aagyat | Official Music Video |
snippet.description:
Aagyat Presents: New Nepali Dj Dancing Song

#manaimanma #nepalisong #nepalimusic #nepalidancingsong #nepalidjremixsong #nepalidj #nepalidjsong #nepalifilmsong #officialsong #nepalilokgeet #nepaliviralsong #nepaligeet #newtrendingsong 
#aagyat #NepaliSong #NepaliDJ #NepaliMusic #NepaliLoveSong
#NepaliTrending #NepaliDance #DJMusic #RomanticSong
#NepaliVideo #NepaliTikTok #ViralNepali #LoveSong
#NepaliCouple #DJRemix #MusicVideo #OfficialMusicVideo
#NepalMusic #TrendingNow #DanceSong #himalayanvibes 
#newsong
--------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Manai manma…
Manai manma…

Ya ta tuna layeu ki…
Ya ta manko chabi choryeu timile…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Timile mero mutu choyau chupchap
Manai manma… manai manma…
Maya basyo… thahai nabhai

Manai manma socheko kurani
Jhattai thaha pauchau ho kasari
Bhana timile… bhana timile
Ya ta tuna layau ki
Ya ta manko chabi choryeu timile

Hey… Hey…
Hands up…
Manai manma…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Body move gara… side to side
Manai manma… manai manma…

Uff furti her
Lau her furti her
Timi jasto hajarau pachi chan
Furti nadekhau
Timile furti nadekhau
Nakkale ketale maya nabolau

Timi najik huda mutu dhadkincha
Malai pani kina yesto lagcha
Shayad yo nai maya ho…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Manai manma… manai manma…
Move your body nonstop
Ya ta tuna layau ki
Ya ta manko chabi choryau timile

Manai manma…
Manai manma…
🎶 Audio Credits:

♬ Song:- 
Manai Man Ma मनै मनमा

♬ Vocal:-
Aagyat

♬ Lyrics: 
Sujan Koirala
Ramesh Luitel

©️ Aagyat, 2026

snippet.title: Saving My X Girlfriend in Minecraft SMP
snippet.description:
How I Saved My X Girlfriend in Her Minecraft SMP

In this video, my girlfriend gets lost in our Minecraft SMP, and I go on a crazy adventure to find her. Along the way, there are intense fights, challenges, and unexpected moments. In the end, I finally rescue my ex-girlfriend… but the journey wasn’t easy!

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

Subscribe & Follow Sony Music India:
https://www.youtube.com/@UC56gTxNs4f9xZ7Pa2i5xNzg 
https://www.facebook.com/SonyMusicIndia 
https://www.instagram.com/sonymusicindia
https://www.snapchat.com/add/sonymusic_india
https://twitter.com/sonymusicindia

snippet.title: Khesari Lal New Song | Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)
Additional Vocal - Vipul Pandey , Gangesh Raja , Ajay Singh Aj

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#rotigaram
#khesarilalyadav 
#namritamalla 
#shilpiraj 
#mungda 
#newbhojpurisong 
#newbhojpurigana 

Learn to sing in Sur with AI Powered Personal Music Teacher- Padhanisa by Saregama. Download Padhanisa App now; https://sarega.ma/padhanisa

Follow us on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/3FxwPgo 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/32rkJqM
X: https://x.com/saregamaglobal

Label:: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

snippet.title: Gehra Hua - Lyrical (Full Version) | Dhurandhar, Ranveer Singh, Sara A,Shashwat Sachdev,Arijit Singh
snippet.description:
Dive into the full depth of emotions with lyrics that bring every feeling to life.

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR

Written, Directed and Produced by: Aditya Dhar
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by: Lokesh Dhar

Cast: Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Akshaye Khanna, R. Madhavan, Arjun Rampal, Sara Arjun

A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma
Music producers: Sayantan Guha, Yash Singh
Bassist: Mohini Dey 
Tabla: Fateh Mohammed Sulemani
Sarangi: Momin Khan 
Backing vocals: Nikitha Venkatesh, Divya S Iyer, Shudi Ramani, Srishhti Bhitrikothiy

Mixed and mastered by: Akash Shravan

Lyrics:
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Tu agar meri ye ujaale tere 
Tu agar meri dil hawaale tere 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Laakhon farishton ki hai tu jaan 
Wo poochte hain rehti kahan 
Meri baahon mein rehti unko bataa 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Usne bhi tujhsa dekha kahan 
Hai raunakein wahan tu hai jahan 
Meri baahon mein rehna yehi hai dua 
Tu agar meri hai fasaana tera 
Tu agar meri toh zamaana tera 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Teri mohabbat mein jalna bhi hai 
Aur tujhse bachke hi chalna bhi hai 
Kuch rang apna badalna bhi hai 
Maine dhalna tere rang mein hai sadaa 
Tu chaand hai ik dhadakta hua 
Chori se mujhko hi takta hua 
Seene se lagke chamakta hua 
Meri jannat ka rasta 
Tu hi toh hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Zaalima | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Love Song
snippet.description:
Song - Zaalima
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: Jab Talak (First Look) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh, Akasa | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
WARNING ⚠️
This summer just got HOTTER🔥

#JabTalak first look out now

#DanceLikeNoOnesWatching #Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Music : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Singer : Arijit Singh, Akasa
➟ Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
➟ Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor,  Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain & Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:


(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×4

Hai thoda besura par dil mein taal hai
Isko hum naachne se
tokein kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×4

Nachchaan aaj main shukar mana ke
Sone yaar tonh nazrein mila ke
Mainu lor kise di koi na
saare jag di laaj bhula ke

Chal mood banake sufi
Thodi kar lein bewakoofi
Choolhe mein jaaye mitra
Duniya bhar ki masroofi

Pairon ko par lagne se rokeon kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×4


ANTARA

Ve raanjha aag hai jitni idhar lagi
Tu bhi maan le dugni udhar lagi

Dono dil hi barabar jhulas gaye 
Pher.. jaan de kitni kidhar lagi

Ajj yaar de karke sadqe 
Maine pyale pyale gatke
Chal dekhein dil patri se
Aakhir kab tak na bhatke

Denge bhi ik dooje ko dhokhe kab talak..

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×4

Behki jawaniyaan jaise barood hain
Dekhein uthte nahin hain 
Shole kab talak

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) ×2

© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

PREM THAPA

RUPESH ADHIKARI
MAN G.C. 
PRABIN RASAILI - THAKURBABA YOUTH CLUB TEAM
MADHUR PAUDEL
SUBASH PARIYAR
SUNIL SHAHI 
BINOD DHAKAL 
RAJESH OLI
BIMAL SUBEDI
DINESH KC
BIKASH THAPA
GAJUREL THAQURI

--------------------------------------------

Lyrics :-

बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 
बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

घर त मेरो यहाँ हैन बाँके बर्दिया 
तिम्रो रुपले ए कान्छि दिलै चोर्दिया

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

माईला दाई हजुर, केछ केटा हो हल्लिचल्ली
ठिक छ दाई, दामी दामी दामी 
कता हो हामी ?

बर्दियामा हो दाई कता जानू खै 
पाँच बर्ष लभ परेको गर्लफ्रेन्ड पोइल गै 
हाहाहा ... हाहाहा..
मान्छे बौलाएसी कस्को के लाग्छ र खै 

भेट्न आउछु भन्थी मलाई कोहलपुरको चोकमा 
एक कार्टुन रक्सी खाएँ मैले रिसको झोकमा 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

कता कता - यता यता 
कता कता - यता यता 

तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म 
तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म

Beerko CC aayo kamal bc
Beerko CC aayo kamal bc

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

5 Barsa love pareko girlfriend poila gai
Haha haha haha 
Manxe baulayasi kasko k lagxa ra khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Kata kata- yata yata 
Kata kata - yata yata 

Timrai saurai lagyapaxi timlai vetna man lagyo jhyamma jhyamma

snippet.title: [NP] 2026 PMNC Nepal | Grand Finals LAN | Day 1 | Yuddha ko lagi Utha!
snippet.description:
Yuddha aba antim charanma pugisakyo — 2026 PUBG MOBILE National Championship Nepal ko Grand Finals LAN, Infinity Lounge, Bhaktapur ma suru bhayo. Day 1 le tone set garnechha, jaha desh bharika top teams haru dominance, consistency ra PMNC South Asia Playoffs ko lagi crucial step ko lagi clash gardai chhan.

Expect garnus intense matchups, smart strategic plays, ra leaderboard ma early pressure — sabai team haru Top 12 ma afno thau secure garna jor lagaunechan.

📍 LAN Location:
The Infinity Lounge, Bhaktapur, Nepal

🎯 Qualification:
Top 12 Teams PMNC South Asia Playoffs ma qualify hunechan

🔥 Slot List:
YONKO JUTTIS
DRS GAMING
HIDDEN LEAF ESPORTS
NEPX ESPORTS
4 DEATH MACHINES
T2K ESPORTS
ABRUPT SLAYERS
ROYAL DRAGON ESPORTS
RIVALS X
3 REAL BROS
TEAM TGB
ONLY ESPORTS
TEAM OG
READY FOR WAR
THE 4 ELEMENTS
DREVHE ESPORTS

🗺️ Day 1 Map Schedule:
Match 1: Rondo
Match 2: Miramar
Match 3: Miramar
Match 4: Erangel
Match 5: Erangel

📺 Stage set bhayo — harek shot important cha, harek move decisive huncha.

#PUBGMOBILE #2026PUBGMOBILE #RoadToPMGO 

Follow us:
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/pubgmobile.np.official
YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@PUBGMOBILEEsportsSouthAsia
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/pubgm.np.official
Twitter - https://www.twitter.com/esportspubgm
Twitch - https://www.twitch.com/pubgmobileesports

snippet.title: Raanjhana Ve (Lyrical Video) | Antara Mitra | Soham Naik | Hindi Love Song| Romantic Hindi Song 2026
snippet.description:
💖 Raanjhana Ve – Lyrical Video 💖
Fall in love with the soulful melody of Raanjhana Ve, beautifully sung by Antara Mitra and Soham Naik. This romantic Hindi song captures the essence of love, emotions, and heartfelt connection.

Enjoy the song in a high-quality lyrical video, perfect for singing along and immersing yourself in its soothing vibe.

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Like || Share || Spread || Love

 https://youtube.com/@timesmusicindia

Audio Credits:
Composer: Uddipan Sharma
Singers: Antara Mitra & Soham Naik
Lyrics: Sonu Saggu
Song Programmed By: Sandeep Mitra
Live Guitars & Strokes: Shomu Seal
Riff Music Programmed By: Aishwarya Tripathi
Song Recorded @ MB Recording Studio
Mixed & Mastered By: Gautam Chakrabortty 

Video Credits:
Concept Written & Directed by: Prashant Pandey 
Featuring: Vaishnavi Jha & Yash Malhotra
Cinematographer: Ujwal Gupta 
Editor: Rishabh Shetty 
Stylist: Chandni Doshi
Colorist: Tapasvi Asija
Choreographers: Ria & Anurag 
Casting: Anamika Singh Casting 
First AC: Krishna Perla  
BTS: Aasif Pathan
Fist AD: Mohit Raj Gaba
Hospitality: JD Hotel (Surat)
Produced by: Prashant Pandey (Perpetual Pictures)

Download / Stream on:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/1jmr7nRJCobBQ46lFGRjr5
Apple Music - https://geo.music.apple.com/in/album/raanjhana-ve-single/1580598137?uo=4&app=music
iTunes - https://geo.itunes.apple.com/in/album/raanjhana-ve-single/1580598137?uo=4&app=itunes
Amazon - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B09C8XT4BC
Insta - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/365503571853244
Gaana - https://gaana.com/album/Raanjhana-Ve
JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/raanjhana-ve/AgIKBDdfVAA
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=sfJDnua1cB4&feature=share

Raanjhana Ve Lyrics:-

Puche Baatein Har Ghadi
Khwabo Se Ye Raatein Meri
Tujhse Kya Hai Mera Naata

Labb Kuch Aur Kahe
Dil Mera Shor Kare
Ban Gaya Tu Mera Ranjha

Haa Puche Baatein Har Ghadi
Khwabo Se Ye Raatein Meri
Tujhse Kya Hai Mera Naata

Labb Kuch Aur Kahe
Dil Mera Shor Kare
Ban Gaya Tu Mera Ranjha

Mere Sapno Ki Galiyon Mein
Tera Hi Ishq Rehta Hai
Kahin Bhi Jau Main Man Ye
Teri Hi Aur Behta Hai

hi.description:
💖 रांझणा वे – लिरिकल वीडियो 💖
अंतरा मित्रा और सोहम नाइक द्वारा खूबसूरती से गाए गए गीत रांझणा वे की मधुर धुन से मंत्रमुग्ध हो जाइए। यह रोमांटिक हिंदी गीत प्यार, भावनाओं और दिल से जुड़े जुड़ाव के सार को दर्शाता है।

इस गीत का आनंद उच्च गुणवत्ता वाले लिरिकल वीडियो में लें, जो साथ में गाने और इसकी सुकून भरी धुन में डूबने के लिए एकदम सही है।

👉🏻 टाइम्स म्यूजिक को सब्सक्राइब करें - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

लाइक करें || शेयर करें || फैलाएं || प्यार

https://youtube.com/@timesmusicindia

ऑडियो क्रेडिट:
संगीतकार: उद्दीपन शर्मा

रिफ संगीत प्रोग्रामिंग: ऐश्वर्या त्रिपाठी
गीत रिकॉर्डिंग: एमबी रिकॉर्डिंग स्टूडियो
मिक्सिंग और मास्टेरिंग: गौतम चक्रवर्ती

वीडियो क्रेडिट:
कॉन्सेप्ट लेखन और निर्देशन: प्रशांत पांडे
कलाकार: वैष्णवी झा और यश मल्होत्रा
सिनेमैटोग्राफर: उज्ज्वल गुप्ता
संपादक: ऋषभ शेट्टी
स्टाइलिस्ट: चांदनी दोषी
कलरिस्ट: तपस्वी आसिजा
कोरियोग्राफर: रिया और अनुराग
कास्टिंग: अनामिका सिंह
फर्स्ट एसी: कृष्णा पर्ला
बीटीएस: आसिफ पठान
फर्स्ट एडी: मोहित राज गाबा
हॉस्पिटैलिटी: जेडी होटल (सूरत)
निर्माता: प्रशांत पांडे (परपेचुअल पिक्चर्स)

पूछे बातें हर घड़ी
ख्वाबो से ये रातें मेरी
तुझसे क्या है मेरा नाता

बन गया तू मेरा रांझा

बन गया तू मेरा रांझा

कहीं भी जौ मैं मन ये

उड़ा-उड़ा फिरता हूं कब से मैं
मिले बिन तुझे रह पौ ना

मिले बिन तुझे रह पौ ना

खाली खाली दिन मेरे लगते थे
रातें सारी उठ उठ जागते थे
हाले दिल तुझे कह पाउ ना

तेरी हर बात में शामिल
मेरा हर पल कहता है

तेरी ही और बहता है

snippet.title: They Played PUBG Mobile BLINDFOLDED & This Happened 😂 |
snippet.description:
🔥 What happens when pro players try to play blindfolded ? Chaos, laughter, and insane teamwork!

In this hilarious challenge featuring PUBG Mobile, we put two teams head-to-head:
👉 *Nofear & Sky* 🆚 *Sleepyy & Jiggle*

But here’s the twist one player on each team is completely BLINDFOLDED 😵‍💫 while their teammate guides them using only voice commands! Will communication be enough to secure the win, or will it turn into total disaster? 😂

💥 Expect :
* Funny moments & fails
* Pure teamwork (or complete confusion 😆)

Big thanks to our sponsors: Red Bull, Infinix, and WorldLink for making this possible!

Edit Credit : https://www.instagram.com/biraj_rawal0?igsh=eWZwdWk3OGprNTVq&utm_source=qr

👇 Let us know in the comments:
Who do you think won this blindfold challenge?

snippet.title: Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎧 Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics)
🔔 Subscribe & turn on notifications to stay on the Pulse
⬇️ Stream/Download: https://Powfu.lnk.to/ListenID

Follow Powfu
https://www.instagram.com/pow.fu
https://www.facebook.com/PowfuOfficial
https://www.tiktok.com/@pow.fu

📄 Lyrics: Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head)

Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Yeah, I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future 'cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you've been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hopin' you'll find someone else
'Cause yeah, we still young, there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it out this bed
I hope I go to heaven so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Yeah, aye)
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Aye, yeah)
I'm happy that you here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger, you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos and walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sing me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays, went to church, on Mondays, watched a movie
Soon, you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

#Powfu #beabadoobee #deathbed #lyrics #lyricvideo #karaoke #pulse #pulsepop

To be young and in love in New York City

Midnight into morning coffee, burning through the hours talking
Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

I don't know what it is but I got that feeling

Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Lay here with me, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (yes I do, yes I do, babe)

I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh noo)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

snippet.title: 🙏 अनंत देवी-देवताओं का भजन | Bhajan of Infinite Deities | Divya Darshan Bhakti
snippet.description:
🙏 अनंत देवी-देवताओं का भजन | Bhajan of Infinite Deities | Divya Darshan Bhakti 

---

यह दिव्य भजन “अनंत देवी-देवताओं का भजन” समस्त सृष्टि में विराजमान सभी देवी-देवताओं को समर्पित एक अद्भुत आध्यात्मिक प्रस्तुति है। इस भजन के माध्यम से भक्त अपने मन, वचन और कर्म से समस्त देव शक्तियों का स्मरण करता है और उनकी कृपा प्राप्त करने की प्रार्थना करता है। हिंदू धर्म में अनगिनत देवी-देवताओं का वर्णन मिलता है, जो विभिन्न शक्तियों, गुणों और ऊर्जा के प्रतीक हैं—जैसे सृष्टि के रचयिता, पालनकर्ता और संहारकर्ता।

यह भजन भक्तों को एकता, श्रद्धा और समर्पण का संदेश देता है। इसमें भगवान के विभिन्न रूपों जैसे माता दुर्गा, भगवान शिव, श्री राम, श्री कृष्ण, गणेश जी और अन्य देवताओं की महिमा का गुणगान किया गया है। यह भजन सुनने से मन को शांति, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और आध्यात्मिक शक्ति प्राप्त होती है।
“दिव्य दर्शन भक्ति” के इस भजन का उद्देश्य केवल मनोरंजन नहीं, बल्कि भक्तों को ईश्वर के प्रति गहरी आस्था और प्रेम से जोड़ना है। जब कोई भक्त इस भजन को श्रद्धा से सुनता या गाता है, तो वह अपने जीवन के कष्टों, दुखों और बाधाओं से मुक्ति पाने का मार्ग खोज सकता है।

यह भजन विशेष रूप से पूजा, ध्यान, आरती या किसी भी धार्मिक अवसर पर सुनने के लिए उपयुक्त है। इसकी मधुर धुन और पवित्र शब्द मन को भाव-विभोर कर देते हैं और आत्मा को परमात्मा से जोड़ते हैं।

यदि आप भी अपने जीवन में शांति, सुख और दिव्य कृपा चाहते हैं, तो इस भजन को अवश्य सुनें और अपने प्रियजनों के साथ साझा करें।

----

localized.title: 🙏 अनंत देवी-देवताओं का भजन | Bhajan of Infinite Deities | Divya Darshan Bhakti
localized.description:
🙏 अनंत देवी-देवताओं का भजन | Bhajan of Infinite Deities | Divya Darshan Bhakti 

---

यह दिव्य भजन “अनंत देवी-देवताओं का भजन” समस्त सृष्टि में विराजमान सभी देवी-देवताओं को समर्पित एक अद्भुत आध्यात्मिक प्रस्तुति है। इस भजन के माध्यम से भक्त अपने मन, वचन और कर्म से समस्त देव शक्तियों का स्मरण करता है और उनकी कृपा प्राप्त करने की प्रार्थना करता है। हिंदू धर्म में अनगिनत देवी-देवताओं का वर्णन मिलता है, जो विभिन्न शक्तियों, गुणों और ऊर्जा के प्रतीक हैं—जैसे सृष्टि के रचयिता, पालनकर्ता और संहारकर्ता।

यह भजन भक्तों को एकता, श्रद्धा और समर्पण का संदेश देता है। इसमें भगवान के विभिन्न रूपों जैसे माता दुर्गा, भगवान शिव, श्री राम, श्री कृष्ण, गणेश जी और अन्य देवताओं की महिमा का गुणगान किया गया है। यह भजन सुनने से मन को शांति, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और आध्यात्मिक शक्ति प्राप्त होती है।
“दिव्य दर्शन भक्ति” के इस भजन का उद्देश्य केवल मनोरंजन नहीं, बल्कि भक्तों को ईश्वर के प्रति गहरी आस्था और प्रेम से जोड़ना है। जब कोई भक्त इस भजन को श्रद्धा से सुनता या गाता है, तो वह अपने जीवन के कष्टों, दुखों और बाधाओं से मुक्ति पाने का मार्ग खोज सकता है।

यह भजन विशेष रूप से पूजा, ध्यान, आरती या किसी भी धार्मिक अवसर पर सुनने के लिए उपयुक्त है। इसकी मधुर धुन और पवित्र शब्द मन को भाव-विभोर कर देते हैं और आत्मा को परमात्मा से जोड़ते हैं।

यदि आप भी अपने जीवन में शांति, सुख और दिव्य कृपा चाहते हैं, तो इस भजन को अवश्य सुनें और अपने प्रियजनों के साथ साझा करें।

----

snippet.title: Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul 🌟 (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Cheap Thrills by Sia featuring Sean Paul is an upbeat anthem about having fun without needing money or luxury. 🎶💃 The song celebrates dancing, freedom, and enjoying the moment with friends. Its catchy rhythm and joyful energy make it all about good vibes and living in the now. 🌟🕺

Up with it girl
Rock with it girl

Dance with it girl
Get with it girl (Bada bang bang)

Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Friday night and I won't be long
Gotta do my hair, I put my make up on
It's Friday night and I won't be long

Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)

I got all I need

(Just you an me)

(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)

You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money

As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold

Lyrics:

Bas raat reh gayi thi

Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Tune na jaana tere jaane se kya kya hua
Kitni kahani bani kitna tamasha hua
Jaane tu kaisi hogi aur voh deewana tera
Khush tu bhi kya hi hogi aur kya salona jahan

Bas aankh reh gayi thi

Bas saans reh gayi thi

Bas shaakh reh gayi thi

Bas raakh reh gayi thi

http://www.iamhalsey.com/badlandsbox 

 Lyrics: The Chainsmokers - Closer ft. Halsey 

[Verse 1: Andrew Taggart]
Hey, I was doing just fine before I met you
I drink too much
And that's an issue, but I'm okay
Hey, you tell your friends
It was nice to meet them
But I hope I never see them again

[Pre-Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no calls
Now you're lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever getting older

[Post-Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
We ain't ever getting older
We ain't ever getting older

[Verse 2: Halsey]
You look as good as the day I met you
I forget just why I left you, I was insane
Stay and play that blink-182 song
That we beat to death in Tucson, okay

[Pre-Chorus: Halsey]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no call
Now I'm lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever getting older

[Post-Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever getting older
We ain't ever getting older

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever getting older

[Post-Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever getting older
(No, we ain't ever getting older)
We ain't ever getting older
(No, we ain't ever getting older)
We ain't ever getting older
(We ain't ever getting older)
We ain't ever getting older
(No, we ain't ever getting older)
(We ain't ever getting older)
(No, we ain't ever getting older)

Sab tu mera ,,

There’s nothing left unsaid.

snippet.title: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Katy Perry - The One That Got Away
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)

[Post-Chorus]
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

snippet.title: All Stars Showdown | 1v1s & More | Road To Finals
snippet.description:
The Grand Finals at Gandhinagar are almost here, but before the biggest stage of TEZ FFMIC Spring 2026, we settle some scores first. 

Welcome to the Road to Finals Special Stream, where the best players in India go head to head in exclusive 1v1 showdowns, All Stars chaos, and YOU get to decide who plays alongside the legends. This is not just a warm-up. This is personal.

🔥 AAJA 1v1 SHOWDOWNS
The most anticipated matchups before the Grand Finals:
⚔️ IQOO.TGDELTE vs TSG.IQOOLGND
⚔️ IQOOTG.MAFIA vs TSG.IQOOARJN
⚔️ GODL.MARCO & GODL.YOGI vs RGE.SABO5 & RGE.ASH
⚔️ IQOO.TGAZTEC vs GDR.STRUGGLE

Four battles. Zero mercy. Who walks away with the bragging rights before Gandhinagar?


🏆 ALL STARS SHOWDOWN
Four Team Captains. Eight of India's best competing players. One All Stars battleground.
Team Captains:

👑 Jonty (@JONTYGAMING) 
👑 Fozyajay (@FOZYAJAY)
👑 NonStop (@NonstopGaming_)
👑 Ritik (@ritikjain360)

Participating Players:
🎯 TSG.iQOOLGND
🎯 iQOO.TGMAFIA
🎯 GDR.CROPSE77
🎯 GODL.YOGI
🎯 ARZ.PRODIGY
🎯 HND.SHOTO17
🎯 RNTX.ARSH17
🎯 RNX.ARMAN19

Captains pick their squads. The rest is war.
🗳️ COMMUNITY VOTED TEAMS - YOU DECIDE!
This is where it gets real. Four Legacy Players are up for grabs:
⭐ VasiyoCRJ
⭐ MafiaBala
⭐ Killer
⭐ Iconic

Vote LIVE on stream and decide which team your favourite legacy player joins. Your vote shapes the game.
📅 12 April 2026 | 3:30 PM IST
📺 LIVE on Free Fire MAX Esports India Official
The road ends at Gandhinagar. But first — this.
Feel the Fire. 🔥

#TEZ #FFMIC2026 #FreeFireMAX #RoadToFinals #FeelTheFire #FreeFire

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Sanjha Ko Ghaam (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Sanjha ko Ghaam contemplates life, its tribulations and in the end, acceptance in its rawest form that mirrors the rhythm of a life well-lived, unhurried, rooted, and rich with a quiet purpose. Meanwhile, enjoy a sunset from our hometown, Kalimpong shot by Praveen Chettri & Co.

Bipul Chettri - Vocals
Pranai Gurung – Guitars
Rahul Rai – Bass
Rythem Bansal – Keyboards
Shantanu Sudarshan – Drums
Mayank Raina – Bamboo Flutes

Lyrics & Composition by Bipul Chettri
Arranged by Pranai Gurung & Bipul Chettri
Recorded by Jonty Indra, Ritwik De & Anindo Bose
Mixed & Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya
Producer – Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer – Sonam Tashi

Principal Videography - Praveen Chettri
Additional Videography - Abhishek Painkra
Edit & Colour correction - Karma Tashi

All Rights to the music by Bipul Chettri. 2026.

snippet.title: O Sundari - Bhooth Bangla | Akshay Kumar, Wamiqa Gabbi, Mithila | Vishal Mishra, Nakash A, Antara M
snippet.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Zee Music Company - https://bit.ly/ZeeMusicCo 

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song - O Sundari
Movie - Bhooth Bangla
Music - Pritam 
Lyrics - Kumaar 
Singers - Vishal Mishra, Nakash Aziz, Antara Mitra
Music Production & Sound Design -  Meghdeep Bose
Additional Music Arrangement - DJ Phukan
Mix & Mastered - Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Chief Engineer - Ashwin Kulkarni
Music Production Managers- Anurag Sharma, Brianna Supriyo
Studio Manager - Mithila Lad Nayak
Sound Engineers - Pranav Gupta, Aarvan, Aniruddh Anantha, Akash Mukherjee
Vocal Conductors - Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee
Studio Assistants - Ameya Dayal, Khush Jaggi
Backing Vocal Design – DJ Phukan, Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan
Chorus - Akash Mukherjee, Khush Jaggi, Ameya Dayal

Musicians -
Ethnic Strings - Tapas Roy
Tabla - Ishteyak Khan  
Dholak - Mushtaq Khan, Raju Sardar
Shehnai - Durgesh Bhonsle
Guitars, Bass & Modular Synths - Meghdeep Bose
Recorded at Sound Bakery, Mumbai
Assistant to Meghdeep - Aabhaas Tomar
Mixing Assistants to Shadab Rayeen - Jazbaat, Sohamm, Kundan, Prasad
 
🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring - Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Mithila Palkar, Jisshu U Sengupta, Manoj Joshi & Rajpal Yadav
Director - Priyadarshan
Producer - Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R Kapoor & Akshay Kumar
Co-producers - Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali & Vimal Doshi

snippet.title: Måneskin - Beggin' (Testo/(Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (🔔) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

Follow Måneskin:
https://www.instagram.com/maneskinofficial
https://www.facebook.com/maneskinofficial
https://twitter.com/thisismaneskin

Lyrics:

[Intro]
Put your lovin' hand out, baby
'Cause I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out, darlin'

[Verse 1]
Ridin' high when I was king
I played it hard and fast, 'cause I had everything
I walked away, you warned me then
But easy come and easy go and it would end

[Verse 2]
So anytime I bleed, you let me go

[Chorus]

I'm beggin', beggin' you, ah

The kind of man you want in the end
Only then can I begin to live again

[Verse 4]
An empty shell, I used to be
The shadow of my life was hangin' over me
A broken man that I don't know
Won't even stand the devil's dance to win my soul

[Verse 5]
What we doin'? What we chasin'?

Keep also home
'Cause I don't wanna live in a broken home, girl, I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
Mmm, yeah, yeah, I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Bridge]

Just can't make it all alone
I'm holdin' on, I can't fall back
I'm just a calm, 'bout to fade to black

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you

I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby

So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

Songtext:

[Intro]
Streck mir deine Hand hin, Baby
Denn ich flehe dich an

[Chorus]
Ich flehe dich an
Also streck mir deine Hand hin, Baby
Ich flehe dich an
Also streck mir deine Hand hin, Liebling

[Verse 1]
Ich war der König, als ich noch ganz oben war
Ich habe alles gegeben, denn ich hatte alles
Ich bin gegangen, du hast mich gewarnt
Aber wie es so schön heißt: schnell gewonnen, schnell verloren

[Verse 2]
Also, wann immer ich blute, lässt du mich Los geht's
Ja, immer wenn ich esse, bekommst du mich, nein
Immer wenn ich suche, lässt du mich wissen
Aber ich säe und säe, lass mich einfach gehen
Ich knie nieder, wenn ich bettle
Denn ich will dich nicht verlieren
Hey, ja, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Refrain]
Denn ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Uh, streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an, ah
Und streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Liebling

[Strophe 3]
Ich brauche dein Verständnis
Ich habe so sehr versucht, dein Mann zu sein
Der Mann, den du am Ende willst
Nur dann kann ich wieder anfangen zu leben

[Strophe 4]
Eine leere Hülle war ich einst
Der Schatten meines Lebens hing über mir
Ein gebrochener Mann, den ich nicht kenne
Der nicht einmal den Tanz des Teufels ertragen will, um meine Seele zu gewinnen

[Strophe 5]
Was tun wir? Was jagen wir?
Warum der Tiefpunkt? Warum der Keller?
Warum nutzen wir unsere guten Sachen nicht?
Warum das Bedürfnis, mich zu ersetzen?

Du bist auf dem falschen Weg, weg vom Guten.
Ich will dir ein Bild malen, wo wir sein könnten.
So wie es ein Herz im besten Sinne tun sollte.
Du kannst es weggeben, du hattest es und hast die Quittung bekommen.
Aber ich gehe weiter, öffne immer neue Türen.
Hoffe weiter, denn jetzt gehört dir die Tür.
Bleib auch zu Hause.

Denn ich will nicht in einem zerbrochenen Zuhause leben, Mädchen, ich flehe dich an.

[Refrain]
Mmm, ja, ja, ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an.

Also streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Baby.

Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an.

Also streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Liebling.

[Bridge]
Ich kämpfe hart, um auf eigenen Beinen zu stehen.
Ich schaffe es einfach nicht allein.
Ich halte durch, ich kann nicht zurückfallen.
Ich bin nur noch ruhig, kurz davor zu verblassen. Schwarz

[Refrain]
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Liebling
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Liebling

[Outro]
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus

snippet.title: Kitab (Lyrics Video) : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI | KITAB Lyrical Video | Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki
snippet.description:
Kitab (Lyrics Video) : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI | KITAB Lyrical Video

Kitab (Lyrics Video) : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI | KITAB Lyrical Video | Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki

Listen on : 
*Spotify:* https://url-shortener....



*AUDIO CREDITS:*
SONG : KITAB 
SINGER : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI
LYRICS & COMPOSE : VARUN GARHWALA , MR DUTT
MUSIC & MISX MASTER : MR DUTT

               *Lyrics :*
Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki 
Ya Tane Mumtaj Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai beth Gya Tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Re Hottha Na Gulab Likh Diyu 
Re Akhya Ne Sharab Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga
Chunni Mai Jo Moti Jadre Usne Chhori Tara Likhu 
Chand Fika Lagge Se Yo Rup Kitna Pyara Lilkhu 
Ram Ka ishara Likhu Dekhya Na Nazara Likhhu Bat Chhoti Lage Meri Kaat Ke dubara Likkhu 
Re Battan Ne Alap Likhunga 
Jo dikhja Tu Khaab Likhunga 
Je likhne Mai Beth Gya tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 

Ho Pucche na Tu Mere Te Ya Ashiq ka Haal Resham Te Jyada Hai Sunehre Tere Baal 
Ho Pariya Ke desh Te Tu Aayi Vissa Dalke 
Red Moon Jisi E Tu lage Se Kamal 
Can’t lu Without You You Baby Mine 
If You Touch Me So am Feeling Fine 
Likhu Tere Bare Saari Duniya Ke Bol Laau 
Likhu Tere Bare Sari Duniya Ne Bhul Jau 
Likkhu Tere Bare fir Kuch Or Na Mai Likh Pau 
Tod ke Kalam Fir Fanshi Pe Mai Jhul Jaau 

Tanne Mai Meri Radha Likh Diyu 
Maine Mai Ghanshyam Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To Pkka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Tanne Mai likhhu Rani Dil ki


#kitab #mrdutt #KitabLyrics 
#TaneMaiLikhuRaniDilKi #RaniDilKi #Rani 
#LyricaVideoKitab #KitaabSong #KitabLyricsVideo #DeepakKurai

snippet.title: Noob ID Se Kaal YT Ki Loyalty Test Ki 😱 | Mona Ne Bhi Dhokha Diya? 💔 Kalam Shocked 💔
snippet.description:
Aaj maine Kaal YT ki loyalty test ki ek bilkul naye tareeke se! 🔥  

Ek noob ID bana kar uske group mein ghus gaya. Jaise hi usne mujhe dekha, usne bola “mic on karo bhai”. Main mic on nahi kar paaya. Tab mere dost ne jhooth bol diya ki “ye banda gunga hai, baat nahi kar sakta”.  

Kaal YT turant emotional ho gaya aur bola “koi baat nahi bhai, tension mat lo”. Pura match khela, last round mein maine match jeet diya aur Kaal YT bahut khush ho gaya.  

Match ke baad maine usko message kiya – “Kaal Bhai, main aapke guild mein aa sakta hoon kya?”  

Usne mera profile dekha aur seedha mana kar diya.  

Us moment mujhe bahut bura laga. Maine socha – agar wo ek normal subscriber ko bhi guild mein nahi le sakta, toh mera uspe kaise bharosa ho sakta hai?  

Ab main aur bhi sakht loyalty test lene wala hoon. Jab tak wo ek noob ID ko bhi apna dost nahi maanta… tab tak main uska sacha dost nahi ban sakta 💔  

Puri story dekh lo, bahut emotional hai.

**Tags:**  
#FreeFire #FreeFireIndia #KaalYT #LoyaltyTest #KalamStory #FFDrama #EmotionalStory #FreeFireMax #FriendshipTest #FFGaming #FreeFireCommunity #FreeFireViral #FreeFireSquad #GarenaFreeFire #FreeFireLover #FreeFireClips #GuildDrama #FreeFire2026 #FFShorts

snippet.title: NST Twins & Wifey Gamer लाई मेरो MP5 को उपहार! 🎁 Bye Bye , फेरि भेटौँला! 👋
snippet.description:
Welcome back to A4 Gamer! 🎮

​In today's video, I had an incredible encounter with some of the biggest names in the Nepal Free Fire community—NST Twins and Wifey Gamer! 🤝 It was a high-intensity match, and meeting them in the lobby was a total surprise.

​But when the fight started, my MP5 took over! 💥 With just one spray and a quick reload, I managed to take down these legends. It was an honor to fight against such skilled players, and this match is definitely one for the history books! 🏆

​Watch until the end to see the full fight and that 'Savage' Booyah! 😱

​📌 Video Highlights:

​Unexpected Encounter: Facing NST Twins & Wifey Gamer. ⚔️

​MP5 Power: One reload, two knocks! 💀🔥


​The Final Booyah: How we finished the game! 🏆

​🎯 Topics Covered:

​A4 Gamer vs NST Twins gameplay.

​Wifey Gamer vs A4 Gamer intense fight.

​Best MP5 spray and reload moments.

​Free Fire Nepal Top YouTubers encounter.

​How to play against pro players in Free Fire.

​🔗 Follow the Journey:

​Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/a4gamermama

​Tiktok: https://www.tiktok.com/@a4gamer4

​Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/a4gamer4

​📩 Business Inquiries: b72esports@gmail.com

​#️⃣ Hashtags:

#FreeFire #A4Gamer #NSTTwins #WifeyGamer #MP5Power #FreeFireNepal #SavageGameplay #Booyah #GarenaFreeFire #FFHighlights #NepalGaming
